sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5960" key="a)mfinei/khtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφι-νείκητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄμμα νύμφας</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg001.perseus-grc1:527" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">527</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</entryFree>
